name: Spot Differences Bird Adventure
description: Spot Differences: Bird Adventure is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you find differences between two bird pictures. Look carefully, tap the changes, and complete each level before time runs out. Enjoy colorful birds, beautiful scenes, and simple controls. Perfect for all ages who love easy and brain-teasing games.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to click or tap on the differences between the two images
